name: Peanut Chili Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. GARNISH: Finely chop peanuts and add a dash of paprika if desired.
2. Stir the peanut butter and water together until they form a paste.
3. Add the soy sauce, lemon juice, honey, minced garlic, chili powder, and crushed dried red pepper to the paste.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
5. Spoon the dip into a serving bowl and garnish with chopped peanuts and paprika, if using.
6. Makes 2/3 cup
7. Serve with bland crackers or alongside fresh vegetables such as carrots, broccoli, green or red pepper, or cauliflower.
8. If your peanut butter is too firm, add more water to achieve the desired consistency.
